title: salix ovalifolia subsp. arctolitoralis
intro: Salix ovalifolia subsp. arctolitoralis, also known as the Arcto-litoral Willow, is a subspecies of the Salix ovalifolia plant, typically found in coastal areas with cold and wet conditions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing pain, and preventing infections. The health benefits of Salix ovalifolia subsp. arctolitoralis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Salix ovalifolia subsp. arctolitoralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
